Who I Am

About Me

I'm a BBA student at The Heritage Academy, Kolkata, with a strong commerce background from my ISC exams. My focus is on building a sharp career in Sales & Marketing — not through classroom theory alone, but through real-world execution.

I've completed two internships — one as a Team Leader/Manager at AIESEC in Kolkata, and another in Sales at The Foreign Language Institute. Both gave me ground-level exposure to client handling, persuasion, and pipeline thinking.

Currently deepening my edge in digital marketing, AI tools, stock market and finance — and continuing to expand my knowledge every way possible, because the future belongs to people who combine domain expertise with constant self-upgrading.
